negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_96919956-719f-4215-9d2f-5373dde96130
prompt: A young man walks confidently down a modern office hallway lined with floor-to-ceiling glass walls on both sides. He has short black hair, a neatly groomed short mustache and beard, and is dressed in a black long-sleeve shirt paired with white pants. His gray socks peek out from under his pants, adding a subtle detail to his outfit. As he moves, he gestures naturally with his hands, occasionally placing them on his sides and extending them forward, pointing towards the camera. Midway through the sequence, he raises his right hand slightly, flipping it upside down, before bringing both hands up near eye level and positioning them near the glass walls. The camera follows him smoothly, maintaining a wide shot at eye level, capturing the entire length of the hallway and the urban landscape beyond.  The hallway features light wooden flooring and is part of an upper floor of a building, offering a panoramic view of the cityscape. The buildings outside display a mix of architectural styles, with some having brown, sloped roofs and others being white and flat. The main building on the right showcases two rows of grid windows, visible through the glass windows on the right. Bright, natural light floods the corridor, casting reflections of the man on the left wall. The sky above the buildings appears overcast and washed out, adding a serene backdrop to the scene. The hallway is modern and minimalistic, with a clean, contemporary design, and the glass walls enhance the sense of openness and depth.
